programmes.show_description: Leann Rimes' Lifesaving Thanks. LeAnn Rimes calls on Jonathan and Drew to turn her life-saving friend's inadequate kitchen and bleak deck space into an entertainer's dream. S2, Ep6

Drew is on a road trip, travelling to Norfolk, Pembroke and Essex. In Pembroke, he finds an old church that has been converted into an antiques store with a varied selection. S13, Ep3

programmes.show_description: Una Stubbs. Actress Una Stubbs sets out to discover the story of her paternal grandparents, uncovering a tale of illegitimacy and poverty in the process. S10, Ep1
